items.title: Wells Fargo upgrades Sherwin-Williams, highlighting ‘exceptional’ execution
items.description: Wells Fargo upgraded Sherwin-Williams (SHW) to Overweight from Equal Weight with a price target of $420, up from $350. The firm noted the company’s “exceptional” execution, driving earnings growth despite anemic demand thanks to share gains and positive pricing momentum. The firm added that it is encouraged by Sherwin-Williams’ share gains, new account wins, and efficiency/cost improvements across its segments, and believes these actions position the company as the premier name to own for a hous

items.title: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) Reports Q1 Earnings, Reaffirms 2025 Guidance, Completes Share Buyback
items.description: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) announced its earnings and updated its guidance, reporting stable basic EPS growth amidst slightly declining sales. The company also continued its share buyback program, acquiring significant shares in Q1. The market, however, remained turbulent due to economic data indicating an economic contraction, with major indices experiencing fluctuations. Despite the market managing a 5% rise over the last week, Sherwin-Williams's 5% price change was aligned with general...

items.title: Royal Caribbean outlook, UPS job cuts, Sherwin-Williams earnings
items.description: Yahoo Finance host Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute, including Royal Caribbean's (RCL) latest full-year outlook figures, United Parcel Service (UPS) plans to cut 20,000 jobs in this year as part of a cost-cutting initiative, and Sherwin-Williams (SHW) posting a first quarter earnings beat. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
